user_task_description: This report has an empty summary box and inconsistent accent colors.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Replace the placeholder text in the `Management Summary` box on page 1 with exactly three short lines starting `Supplier:`, `Inspection:`, and `Staffing:` in that order, then retheme the title bar and callout boxes to a cohesive blue-gray palette.
atomic_scope: Only the three constrained summary bullets and the requested blue-gray theme update are explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .pdf document with a filled summary box and a cohesive blue-gray theme.

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
